title: Living in Boulder vlog 6 - 2 - 2017: More word counting for classics

enrichment.summary: Kyle gives a late-night vlog update from Boulder on June 2, 2017. He experiments with Mac dictation/transcription software and talks about grocery shopping multiple times. He describes a current project: counting word lengths of classic books and comparing different menus to each other.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: curious and eager to try it for vlogging, thinks it would be 'trippy'
genuinely fascinated by it and committed to continuing even if it takes weeks

claims.claim: I'm doing a transcript earlier than normal today.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm going to make a new page for the transcript because the current one is too big.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm using a Macintosh for the transcript.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm concerned about memory issues if I record while transcribing.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I have Google Earth and Dream We Room open.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm trying to use the FN key to transcribe my speech, but it doesn't work while recording.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I might film myself with another video camera and then transcribe from that.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: On Macintosh, holding the FN key down brings up a transcription feature.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I plan to try the transcription feature tomorrow with better enunciation.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I got a new video camera memory today.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I worked until I was tired today.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I went to the store three times yesterday because supermarkets were closing.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I went to the store again today and spent around two hundred dollars.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I filled up my house with groceries but might need a few more things like pizza and drinks.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I was working on counting and comparing the sizes of books and menus today.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: This project will take a couple of weeks to complete.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm fascinated with my current project but might not finish it before moving on to something else.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I was listening to a story about moms today.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I think the story about moms is a good book.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm pretty high right now.
